profile: , is a company engaged in the development of future technology. In addition, our specialty is realizing fresh ideas that have never been implemented before. You mention it, and we'll definitely make it happen!.

investor.label: Investor
investor.title: Investor Relations
investor.description: As a company engaged in renewable energy through wind turbine utilization, WindBright is committed to providing clean, sustainable, and environmentally friendly electricity sources. By optimizing wind energy potential, WindBright continues to innovate in delivering efficient energy solutions and supporting a greener future.

1.title: Clean Energy for the Future
1.description: Committed to delivering innovative renewable energy solutions for the world.

2.title: Technology Education for Students
2.description: Optimize STEM learning with our Edukit

3.title: Investment for the Environment
3.description: Together we build a sustainable ecosystem for future generations.

services.desc_1: An interactive educational package designed to introduce students to renewable energy principles through small-scale wind turbine assembly.
services.desc_2: Professional wind turbine installation services for residential and industrial needs to generate eco-friendly independent energy.
services.desc_3: Inspection and maintenance of energy infrastructure using advanced drone technology to ensure safety and optimal performance.

notes.note1: * Does not include inverter damage due to overload
notes.note2: ** Available only in Surabaya and surrounding areas

edukit.label: Renewable Education
edukit.description: WindBright is committed to supporting green energy literacy through interactive edukits. Each kit is designed to provide hands-on learning experiences for students to understand how clean energy works.

installation.label: Technical Services
installation.description: From planning to operation, WindBright’s expert team ensures your wind turbine installation meets the highest safety standards for maximum energy efficiency.

drone.label: Technology Inspection
drone.description: Optimize your energy assets with drone-based maintenance. WindBright provides fast, safe, and accurate inspection solutions without interrupting your turbine or solar panel operations.

hero.description: We combine IoT, Machine Learning, and advanced turbine engineering to transform wind into precise and sustainable power.

solar.title: Solar Panel
solar.desc: High efficiency in capturing photovoltaic energy.

wind.title: Wind Turbine
wind.desc: Optimized wind turbines for maximum energy conversion.

sensor.title: Humidity Sensor
sensor.desc: Precision monitoring for smart energy ecosystems.

drone.title: Drone-Based Maintenance
drone.desc: No more abandoned or damaged wind turbines!

remin.title: Remin (Wind Brake) Automatic Braking System
remin.desc: Operates without electricity or sensors, triggered purely by wind force.

foundation.title: Modular Non-Permanent Foundation
foundation.desc: Up to 8x more cost-efficient than concrete foundations!

about_hero.description: Founded with a vision to revolutionize the energy sector, WindBright serves as a strategic partner in delivering efficient renewable energy infrastructure solutions with a positive global environmental impact.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become a leading pioneer in the development of small-scale wind turbines in Indonesia, reaching even the most remote areas

list.1: Develop efficient wind turbines with the best quality
list.2: Provide rental-based business models accessible to rural communities
list.4: Deliver integrated education through intensive outreach

1.title: Transition to Green Energy
1.desc: Currently, energy in Indonesia is still dominated by fossil fuels. We are committed to helping achieve a renewable energy mix of 23% by 2025 and 31% by 2050.

2.title: Energy Efficiency Improvement
2.desc: We support efficiency projects to create a green economy, reducing greenhouse gas emissions without compromising economic growth.

1.title: Highly Experienced Team
1.desc: Qualified professionals who are experts in renewable technology.

2.title: Best Quality Products
2.desc: Meeting the highest global standards for every energy solution.

3.title: Customer Oriented
3.desc: We prioritize customer satisfaction in every decision.

4.title: Future Ready
4.desc: Continuously innovating for next-generation energy systems.

1.description: The journey began with identifying a technological gap in conventional wind turbine systems. We developed an early prototype to prove a more efficient renewable energy concept.

2.description: In the second year, our idea evolved into a comprehensive solution. We refined the technical design and built prototypes ready for field testing.

3.description: A transformative year with major achievements and expansion. We started delivering real impact to communities.

footer.brand_desc: Leading the sustainable energy transition in Indonesia with smart and efficient future technology solutions.
